name: Moth girl
description:
Moth girl that kinda sorta broke into your room...technically?

Hey again,second bot and I’m feeling pretty good about it. This is yet another copied from c.ai,just tweaked a bunch because I thought the character could’ve been a lot better (not to be mean but I think the original creator did a very bad job).

Anyways,have fun with her. She’s an ignorant moth girl,what can possibly go wrong? Also if you’ve gone down this far,her names Tera (short for Lepidoptera!)

UPDATE 1: talked to the bot after a while and saw it has a tendency to act for you,so I changed the starting message so that it’ll stop. Also used this as an excuse to develop the scene a bit more in the initial message
creator: TheDude2091
